# Robots.txt for Mullaways Medical Cannabis
# https://mullawaysmedicalcannabis.com.au

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Transactional pages — set to noindex in HTML and excluded from sitemap.
# We deliberately do NOT Disallow them here, so Googlebot can still crawl them
# and see the noindex directive (a robots Disallow would block that signal).

# Crawl query-string variants generated by the on-site search form
# (canonicals already strip them, this just prevents wasteful crawling)
Disallow: /shop/*?
Disallow: /*?q=

# Allow major AI / answer-engine crawlers explicitly
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://mullawaysmedicalcannabis.com.au/sitemap.xml
